creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2007-09-27 00:33:40 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    ports-mgmt/pkgsearch Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  [NEW PORT]sysutils/pkgsearch : find your packages
  
          pkgsearch find packages in ports in any place from your
          computer , and find also packages
          installeds in your system, pkgsearch use c++, boost and
          sqlite3 for search packages more
          fast and is compiled with cmake
  
  PR:             ports/116404
  Submitted by:   "Diego Rocha" <diegorocha1987@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/ports-mgmt/pkgsearch/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/pkgsearch/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/pkgsearch/pkg-descr (new)
